ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of location */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the location */,
  "lez_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Low Emission Zone (LEZ) information */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the location is situated */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location (in meters) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the location coordinates (in meters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_lez_id FOREIGN KEY ("lez_id") REFERENCES lez_zones ("lez_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_code" TEXT /* Code for the city (e.g., BR, AW) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code associated with the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lez_zones" (
  "lez_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LEZ */,
  "lez_name" TEXT /* Name of the LEZ */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the LEZ */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Geometric boundary of the LEZ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lez_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being updated */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value for the updated field */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_tags_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_category_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being mapped */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the location is mapped to */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the mapping (e.g., for ranking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_category_map_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES location_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the comment is associated with */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the author of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_comments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the rating is associated with */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  "rated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_ratings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., thumbnail, full-size) */,
  "captured_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was captured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_images_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the video is associated with */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., 360-degree, time-lapse) */,
  "captured_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was captured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_videos_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_audios" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the audio file is associated with */,
  "audio_url" TEXT /* URL of the audio file */,
  "audio_type" TEXT /* Type of audio (e.g., ambiance, narration) */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audio was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_audios_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the document is associated with */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PDF, Word) */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_documents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the analytics are associated with */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the location */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* Average rating for the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_analytics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
